untranslatable_reason: This signal requires event-driven conditions (merger announcement detection, stock ratio collar validation, options market data availability) and multi-leg derivative position construction (simultaneous long equity + long put options with specific strike/expiration/premium parameters). These cannot be expressed using only price/technical indicators. The signal also references external event catalysts and options chain conditions not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Partial translation provided: Converted acquiring company stock price drop (close < 45) as entry trigger and collar upper bound (close >= 55) as exit. However, the core strategy requires: (1) merger announcement detection, (2) verification of share ratio collar structure (0.455-0.556 range), (3) options market monitoring (put availability, time value < 0.5 points), (4) multi-leg position coordination (10,000 shares + 56 put contracts), and (5) merger close date tracking. A proper implementation requires event data and options chain feeds beyond standard OHLCV indicators.
